c.d: The visual fidelity, realism, and artistic appeal of the photo effects produced by the app
The breadth and diversity of filters, overlays, and visual styles available to users
The level of customization and fine-tuning available for adjusting effects
The speed and efficiency with which effects are applied and processed
The intuitiveness and ease of navigating the app and applying effects
The uniqueness and creativity of the effects, including use of AI or novel techniques
